memberdef.name: REGISTER_ADDON_CLASS
memberdef.initializer: namespace Dali \ { \ namespace AddOns \ { \ __attribute__((constructor)) void AddOnConstructor() \ { \ AddOnConstructorInternal(); \ } \ AddOnBase* AddOnBase::mSingleton = nullptr; \ AddOnBase* CreateAddOn() \ { \ return new ADDON_CLASS_WITH_FULL_NAMESPACE(); \ } \ } \ }

detaileddescription.para: Macro must be used in order to auto-register AddOn with the AddOnManager. Note: The macro requires GCC/Clang compiler and currently only Linux-based environment is supported.
